pi_items.source: setup_task.sh injects PROJ_NAME='Pd-Catalyzed Cross-Coupling Study' into the PostgreSQL projects table.
setup_task.sh injects EXP_NAME='Suzuki Coupling Optimization Run 5' into the PostgreSQL experiments table.
Matches the explicit instructions in the task description and is a subset of the tasks created in setup_task.sh.
Matches the explicit instructions in the task description and is the remaining subset of the tasks created in setup_task.sh.

privileged_info_summary: The environment setup script (setup_task.sh) dynamically injects a project named 'Pd-Catalyzed Cross-Coupling Study' and an experiment named 'Suzuki Coupling Optimization Run 5' into the SciNote PostgreSQL database. Five task modules ('Reagent Preparation', 'Reaction Setup', 'Reaction Monitoring', 'Product Purification', 'NMR Analysis') are synthetically generated for the experiment in an uncompleted state, which exactly aligns with the metadata values and explicit task description requirements for the tasks to be completed versus left uncompleted.
